Synthetic Shared-Control Roadmap

Portfolio planning report: the optimizer's recommended test schedule and market assignments. Shared controls are allowed only within policy; treatment overlap and treatment/control conflicts are blocked. Calendar covers 2026-12-28 to 2027-12-27.

Recommended tests 3 Market-weeks used 792 Markets on calendar 66 Alternatives considered 15 Warnings 0

Portfolio Test Calendar

Each row is a market and each column is a calendar week. Colors show what every market is doing week by week across all recommended tests, including pre-periods and post-test cooldowns. Taller rows are higher-volume markets (square-root scale). Hover any cell for the exact tests and dates.

66 markets × 53 weeks. Pre-period 14 days; cooldown 30 days. No market-volume data was supplied, so rows share equal heights.

Recommended Tests

The optimizer's picks, one row per test. Best MDE is the smallest relative effect the most sensitive metric can detect — lower means a more sensitive design. The objective score is the configured priority adjusted by MDE and control-pool penalties.

MDE Tradeoff Frontier

Each dot is a candidate design plotted by test duration and its best (most sensitive) minimum detectable effect. Lower is more sensitive. The filled blue dots are the optimizer's picks; hollow gray dots are the alternatives it passed over. Hover a dot for details.

Duration vs Best MDE

18 candidate designs · 3 selected

Each dot is a candidate design; lower is more sensitive. The highlighted dots are the optimizer's picks — if a hollow dot sits clearly lower at a similar duration, it bought sensitivity the optimizer traded away for balance, priority, or control-pool reasons.
